basic_details.job_title: BHEL PTMC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Part Time Medical Consultant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited, Regional Operations Division, Mumbai (BHEL)
basic_details.short_information: The Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited, Regional Operations Division, Mumbai, has released the official Part Time Medical Consultant Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. ROD/MUMBAI/PTMC/2026/01 at BHEL Official Website. A total of 02 vacancies have been announced under the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with qualifications such as MD/MS/DNB, PG Diploma, or MBBS with relevant experience can attend the walk-in interview on 21-05-2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in interview details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS/DNB, PG Diploma, MBBS with 1 year experience
qualification.details: PTMC01: MD/MS/DNB (or PG Diploma or MBBS with 1 year experience as fallback) PTMC02: MBBS with 1 year experience

salary_details.details: PTMC01: Rs. 1200 per hour (or Rs. 980/750 as fallback) PTMC02: Rs. 750 per hour

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BHEL Part Time Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on 21st May 2026. There is no separate application deadline before the walk-in date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Part Time Medical Consultant posts?
faq.answer: For one post (PTMC01), MD/MS/DNB or PG Diploma or MBBS with 1 year experience is required. For the other post (PTMC02), MBBS with 1 year experience is the qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Part Time Medical Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Part Time Medical Consultant posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Part Time Medical Consultant roles?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 750 to Rs. 1200 per hour, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for Part Time Medical Consultant?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Part Time Medical Consultant positions at BHEL, Regional Operations Division, Mumbai.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Part Time Medical Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Personal Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the Walk-in Interview be held?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview will be held at Bharat Heavy Electricals Limited, Regional Operations Division, Mumbai.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent job?
faq.answer: No, the job is on a contractual basis for the Part Time Medical Consultant positions.
